CustomField.formula: CASE( countryName__c , 'India', 'India', 'United States', 'United States', 'Canada', 'Canada', 'Belize','LATAM', 'Costa Rica','LATAM', 'El Salvador','LATAM', 'Guatemala','LATAM', 'Honduras','LATAM', 'Mexico','LATAM', 'Nicaragua','LATAM', 'Panama','LATAM', 'Argentina','LATAM', 'Bolivia','LATAM', 'Brazil','LATAM', 'Chile','LATAM', 'Colombia','LATAM', 'Ecuador','LATAM', 'Guyana','LATAM', 'Paraguay','LATAM', 'Peru','LATAM', 'Suriname','LATAM', 'Uruguay','LATAM', 'Venezuela','LATAM', 'Cuba','LATAM', 'Dominican Republic','LATAM', 'Haiti','LATAM', 'dependencies and constituent entities','LATAM', 'Guadeloupe','LATAM', 'Martinique','LATAM', 'Puerto Rico','LATAM', 'Saint-Barthélemy','LATAM', 'Saint-Martin','LATAM', 'Belarus','Eastern Europe', 'Bulgaria','Eastern Europe', 'the Czech Republic','Eastern Europe', 'Hungary','Eastern Europe', 'Moldova','Eastern Europe', 'Poland','Eastern Europe', 'Romania','Eastern Europe', 'Slovakia','Eastern Europe', 'Ukraine','Eastern Europe', 'Other')
CustomField.label: Region(Deprecated)
